data.title: Spot Gold Reaches Record High, Surpasses $3,057 Per Ounce
data.description: According to BlockBeats, spot gold has reached a new historical high, surpassing $3,057.85 per ounce. This marks an increase of over 16% for the year.

data.title: Jupiter launches Quick Accounts, enabling instant, signature-free transactions
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Jupiter announced the launch of Quick Accounts. It is reported that Quick Accounts is a wallet embedded in Jupiter that can perform instant signature-free transactions and supports transactions with robot-like performance.

data.title: Ethereum testnet Pectra is scheduled to go live on the mainnet on April 30
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Ethereum core developer terence posted on the X platform that the Ethereum test network Pectra is tentatively scheduled to be launched on the main network on April 30. Currently, it is waiting for the next core developer to solve some unresolved minor issues and conduct a comprehensive confirmation.

data.title: WAL market value exceeds 600 million US dollars, currently at 0.4836 USDT
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News shows that the market value of WAL has exceeded 600 million US dollars, and is currently reported at 0.4836 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 141.8%.

data.title: Binance will adjust the minimum trading volume of NEOUSDC perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will adjust the minimum trading volume of the USDⓈ-MNEOUSDC perpetual contract from 0.01NEO to 0.001NEO at 9:30 (UTC) on March 28, 2025. During the adjustment period (09:30-09:31UTC), the contract trading function will be suspended, and users will not be able to place or cancel orders. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: APOLLO Announces Permissionless Bitcoin On-Chain Transactions Now Live
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to official news, APOLLO announced that permissionless Bitcoin on-chain transactions are now online. APOLLO is a Bitcoin DeFi liquidity platform developed by Zeus Network on Solana. This launch represents that it is promoting the expansion of the BTC ecosystem on the Solana blockchain.

data.title: A smart money spent about $1,140 yesterday to buy 10.4 million GHIBLI, and currently has a return of 196 times
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that according to monitoring by The Data Nerd, a smart money spent about US$1,140 yesterday to buy 10.4 million GHIBLI. He has not sold any tokens so far, and his unrealized profit has reached US$224,000, with a return of 196 times.

data.title: Arcium Completes Angel Round Financing, Jupiter, Meow and Other Investors
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Arcium, a confidential computing network, announced the completion of its angel round of financing, with participation from Jupiter co-founder Meow, MegaETH founding team member Namik, Jupiter co-founder Siong, and others. In addition, Arcium also conducted some community fundraising through echo. So far, the total financing amount has reached 11 million US dollars.

data.title: The BTCFi protocol Corn airdrop query page is now online, with a total of 2.1 billion tokens, 52% of which are allocated to the community
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News BTCFi protocol Corn posted on the X platform that the airdrop query page has been launched. According to its token economics, the total supply of tokens is 2.1 billion, and the initial circulation supply is 525 million (25%), of which: 
· 52% allocated to the community: 10% for initial token allocation, 5% for ecosystem builders, 33.3% for user issuance and network security, and 3.7% for community fundraising
· 13% allocated to early supporters: seed round investors and institutional participants in Legion sales
· 25% allocated to core contributors: engineers, products, business development, marketing and core builders
· 10% allocated to the foundation
Previously, Corn, an Ethereum L2 network focusing on Bitcoin DeFi, completed a $8.3 million community round of financing through Legion, which was oversubscribed seven times within a few hours. The project will launch TGE tokens on Friday (March 28).

data.title: CZ releases GPT-4o generated images but says he won't change his social media profile picture
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Binance co-founder CZ released ChatGPT's GPT-4o generated pictures on the X platform and wrote: "I may be the last person to try this person, but I will not change the avatar of the X platform. I personally prefer non-ghibli style pictures."
